name: TEST - Coupa Total Mismatch (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.coupa_total_calculated)
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total)
  and abs(field.coupa_total_calculated) != abs(field.amount_total)
)

payload.content: The Total Amount is different from the total that will be calculated in Coupa. Please double-check the amounts.
The Total Amount is different from the total that will be calculated in Coupa. Please double-check the amounts.
